title: News Corp. planning $500 million offering of 10-year bonds to fund acquisitions of Base Chemicals and OPIS
text: News Corp. NWS, +0.31% said Tuesday it is planning to offer $500 million of 10-year bonds in a private offering with the proceeds earmarked to fund the acquisition of the Base Chemicals and Oil Price Information Service businesses from S&P Global Inc. and IHS Markit Ltd. News Corp., the owner of Dow Jones and MarketWatch, the publisher of this report, announced the acquisition of Base Chemicals in December for $295 million.

title: News Corp. hit by cyberattack attributed to Chinese hackers
text: The data breach compromises emails and other journalist information.

title: News Corp Suspects China Behind Its Hack
text: News Corp (NASDAQ: NWS) (NASDAQ: NWSA) believed the China government was behind a recent hack of its computer systems, Bloomberg reports. News Corp disclosed an unnamed cloud service used by News Corp was the “target of persistent cyberattack activity.

title: News Corp says hacked in potentially China-tied attack
text: Media giant News Corp said Friday it was hit by hackers who stole company data in an attack that the firm's cybersecurity consultant said could likely be traced back to China.

title: Suspected Chinese hackers hit News Corp with 'persistent cyberattack' in January
text: News Corp suffered a "persistent cyberattack" in January, the company said Friday, and investigators believe Chinese spies may be responsible.

title: News Corp. (NWSA) Q2 Earnings Beat, Revenues Rise 13% Y/Y
text: News Corporation's (NWSA) second-quarter fiscal 2022 results reflect strength in Digital Real Estate Services, Dow Jones and Book Publishing segments.

title: News Corp cyber-attack: firm says it believes hack linked to China
text: Hacking of emails at Murdoch company raises fears for safety of journalists' confidential sources

title: Cyberattack on News Corp, believed linked to China, targeted emails of journalists, others
text: News Corp was the target of a hack that accessed emails and documents of some employees, including journalists, an incursion the company's cybersecurity consultant said was likely meant to gather intelligence to benefit China's interests.

title: News Corp says one of its network systems targeted by cyberattack
text: Rupert Murdoch owned-News Corp said in a regulatory filing on Friday that one of its network systems was the "target of persistent cyberattack activity".

title: News Corporation's (NWSA) CEO Robert Thomson on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: News Corporation's (NWSA) CEO Robert Thomson on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript

title: News Corp. (NWSA) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Beat Estimates
text: News Corp. (NWSA) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 175% and 5.15%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2021. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Earnings Beat In The Cards For News Corp's Stock?
text: News Corp, a global, diversified media and information services company, is scheduled to report its fiscal second-quarter results on Thursday, February 3. We expect NWSA to likely beat the revenue and earnings expectations, driven by the positive momentum of Digital Real Estate Services.
